productDisplayName: Puma Men Pumpom Olive Black Floater
description: Perfect for those long days of working around the clock, the puma Photon sandal is stylish and comfortable at the same time. With padded straps and a cushioned footbed, there's nothing better that you can offer your feet for that breathable feel.UpperVelvety synthetic leather velcro straps in the forefoot and midfoot for a snug FitBackfoot strap for support and to lock the foot in placePerforations on the sides of straps for enhanced breathabilityCushioned straps for comfortStitch detailing on straps with puma cat logo for styleMidsolePU footbed for durable, all-day cushioned comfortFootbed textured with hexagonal patterns for a massage feelCurved footbed for ergonomic comfort to the inner archOutsoleTPR outsole with V-shaped lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and mid-length of the foot for absolute grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustUse a brush to remove dust from the velvetty strapsDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
